stemHtml: What are the specifications for a Category I precision approach lighting system?

options.a: A centreline row of lights extending 600 m with a 30 m crossbar at 300 m from the threshold.
options.b: A centreline row of lights extending 900 m with a 30 m crossbar at 300 m from the threshold.
options.c: A centreline row of lights extending 300 m with a 30 m crossbar at 150 m from the threshold.
options.d: A centreline row of lights extending 1200 m with a 30 m crossbar at 420 m from the threshold.
